PARAM.description: the arguments for the interpolation points
PARAM.name: x
PARAM.content: the arguments for the interpolation points

PARAM.description: the values for the interpolation points
PARAM.name: y

RETURN.description: function which interpolates the data set

THROWS.description: if @code x and @code y have different sizes.
THROWS.name: DimensionMismatchException
THROWS.content: if @code x and @code y have different sizes.

THROWS.description: if @code x is not sorted in strict increasing order.
THROWS.name: NonMonotonicSequenceException

THROWS.description: if the size of @code x is smaller than 2.
THROWS.name: NumberIsTooSmallException
THROWS.content: if the size of @code x is smaller than 2.
